mapper.select: SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(1), 0) FROM analysis_task WHERE status = 2

SELECT IFNULL(SUM(t.attendance_count), 0) as total_attendance, IFNULL(SUM(s.student_count), 0) as total_student FROM analysis_task t JOIN course_schedule s ON t.schedule_id = s.id WHERE t.status = 2 AND t.created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)
SELECT IFNULL(AVG(total_score), 0) FROM analysis_task WHERE status = 2 AND created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)

SELECT d.behavior_type as name, IFNULL(SUM(d.count), 0) as value FROM analysis_detail d JOIN analysis_task t ON d.task_id = t.id WHERE t.status = 2 AND t.created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY d.behavior_type

SELECT u.name as name, IFNULL(AVG(t.total_score), 0) as value FROM analysis_task t JOIN teacher u ON t.teacher_id = u.id WHERE t.status = 2 AND t.created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY t.teacher_id, u.name ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%m-%d') as dateStr, IFNULL(AVG(total_score), 0) as score FROM analysis_task WHERE status = 2 AND created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY dateStr ORDER BY dateStr ASC

SELECT IFNULL(SUM(t.attendance_count), 0) as total_attendance, IFNULL(SUM(s.student_count), 0) as total_student FROM analysis_task t JOIN course_schedule s ON t.schedule_id = s.id WHERE t.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND t.status = 2 AND t.created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)
SELECT IFNULL(AVG(total_score), 0) FROM analysis_task WHERE teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND status = 2 AND created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)

SELECT d.behavior_type as name, IFNULL(SUM(d.count), 0) as value FROM analysis_detail d JOIN analysis_task t ON d.task_id = t.id WHERE t.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND t.status = 2 AND t.created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY d.behavior_type

SELECT c.name as name, IFNULL(AVG(t.total_score), 0) as value FROM analysis_task t JOIN course_schedule s ON t.schedule_id = s.id JOIN course c ON s.course_id = c.id WHERE t.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND t.status = 2 AND t.created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY s.course_id, c.name ORDER BY value DESC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%m-%d') as dateStr, IFNULL(AVG(total_score), 0) as score FROM analysis_task WHERE teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND status = 2 AND created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY dateStr ORDER BY dateStr ASC
